name: omp-legion
description: MoA-over-MoE orchestration with HOTL governance for Oh My Pi

omp.name: legion
omp.description: MoA-over-MoE orchestration with HOTL governance for Oh My Pi

modelMap.description: JSON object mapping roles to models, strategy, and ensemble size.

defaultEnsembleSize.description: Default number of expert samples per role.

maxConcurrentExperts.description: Max concurrent expert attempts across one dispatch, all tasks combined.

verifyCommand.description: Optional shell command (e.g. 'bun test') run against each code-mutating attempt's isolated branch for execution-grounded consensus. Off by default.

hotl.confidenceFloor.description: Escalate when synthesis confidence falls below this value.

hotl.disagreementThreshold.description: Escalate when synthesis disagreement exceeds this value.

hotl.costCeiling.description: Escalate when host-reported token cost exceeds this value.

embed.apiKey.description: Optional Ollama embedding service API key.
